items.title: Arrays and indexed data: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this JavaScript: Language and Browser Applications misconception? slice and splice are interchangeable ways to copy an array section.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.

feedback.correct: Correct. slice is nonmutating, while splice mutates elements and length; choose from the ownership contract.
feedback.incorrect: That preserves the misconception. slice is nonmutating, while splice mutates elements and length; choose from the ownership contract.

criteria.description: Selects the source-linked JavaScript: Language and Browser Applications correction rather than the documented misconception.
